item.title: Most people I ever met never get past this.
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: Faye Valentine - Cowboy Bebop Cosplay
item.description:
Kinda fun to see me in the first shot taking a pic for lighting and framing VS. me in the second pic getting into character. Faye is so great and I love channeling her vibe! I really had a great time playing with the lighting on this one as well - has been so much fun having a studio space to play with since January, has allowed for me to dabble into lighting more! Also, yes, I had to redo this cosplay upon Imgur's request, and yes, maybe next week I'll share me doing a whole DJ remix in this cosplay - also all of your idea.
Reference
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: What Happened Today #90
item.description: The economy shrank during his first months in office, but Trump blamed Biden. He took credit for last quarter’s growth, but that was before he took office and before voters chose him. Then he called into a televised townhall where he claimed that he had made no mistakes during his second term. He may have been celebrating early because his company announced a multibillion dollar resort deal with Qatar today. Elsewhere, his cabinet canceled school mental health grants, vaccine funding, and talked with Rwanda about accepting deportees from other countries. The resistance is not theoretical today. Protests are happening. Pick one and show up. Don’t rely on the algorithm. Get this in your inbox every night, free and private, so you never miss what’s really going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today to stay informed. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-no-mistakes 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-blames-biden 3. https://go.govbrief.today/only-two-dolls 4. https://go.govbrief.today/senate-keeps-tariffs 5. https://go.govbrief.today/musk-can-stay 6. https://go.govbrief.today/tesla-look-ceo 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-qatar-deal 8. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-social-security 9. https://go.govbrief.today/mahdawi-released 10. https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-status 11. https://go.govbrief.today/rwanada-take-deportees 12. https://go.govbrief.today/iowa-migration 13. https://go.govbrief.today/school-mental-health 14. https://go.govbrief.today/universal-vaccine-grant 15. https://go.govbrief.today/niaid-ebola-stopped 16. https://go.govbrief.today/employee-location-email 17. https://go.govbrief.today/krebs-retailiation-continues 18. https://go.govbrief.today/usaid-memorial-wall 19. https://www.yahoo.com/news/kash-patel-fbi-reassigns-agents-162936107.html 20. https://go.govbrief.today/informant-lied-biden 21. https://go.govbrief.today/protest-safely Hey, Imgur friends, I'm slammed, but will back to hang with you all ASAP.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Another day, another round of phone clearing.
item.dc:creator: wuggles23

item.title: I have too many memes: Dump #107
item.description:
The reason I call this ‘I have too many memes’ is because I have over 12,000 and my phones doesn’t like it but I don’t want to just delete them. So a lot of these are VERY dated. This is going to be like that for a long time.
Sorry for the rant but people get confused about memes when they are two years old. This is a collection of very stale stuff and not all of it aged well. This goes for all my dumps probably forever.
I didn’t crop this it’s how I found it. CW for the next one
item.dc:creator: Sweenerd

item.dc:creator: GadgetQuill

item.title: These posts are misinformation, here's why
item.description:
Have you seen these post describing a bill that will "Ban Political Meme's" ? This is a misinformation post, lets dive in!
* * * M i s i n f o r m a t i o n * * *
First lets start with the "news" website posting this, "Texas Scorecard". This is a heavy right leaning publication (for comparisons, Fox News is 6.7 and OAN is 7.9 on this scale)
This is the same publication that wanted to let you know that masks don't work against the "Chinese coronavirus"
Now lets get back to the bill, this is the entire bill here in this one screenshot. This specific version was last updated 4/30/2025. You can see the most up to date version of the bill here: https://legiscan.com/TX/drafts/HB366/2025 We will break down specific sections of the bill in the following images.
The number one thing I want to point out here is the very first section "This section applies only to a person who:", so lets check that out and see if we are even subject to the bill. 1) is an officeholder, candidate, or political committee; - Nope, not us. (Probably, if this is you, please get off Imgur and get back to work!) 2) makes expenditures during a reporting period that in the aggregate exceed $100 for political advertising, other than an expense to cover the basic cost of hardware, messaging software, and bandwidth; - Also not us. 3) publishes, distributes, or broadcasts political advertising described by Subsection (b) in return for consideration. - Dang, still not us. So to recap, if you are a politician, or you are involved with paid political advertising for a campaign, this bill applies to you. Are you guys being paid by a political organization to post political ads that contain the memes? No? Then this bill does not apply. Political memes and satire are not Ad's.
So lets say the bill does apply to you, what exactly does the bill say you can't do. Here's is the entire section on what the bill is about stopping. The 2 important parts are: "A person may not, with the intent to influence an election" and "[post images/video/etc]...that did not occur in reality, including an image, audio recording, or video recording that has been altered using generative artificial intelligence technology" So what are the kind of things the bill is trying to ban? Political campaigns posting ads showing an AI video of "Candidate X" running into a burning building to rescue some puppies. Or an ad showing "Candidate Y" with AI voice saying their voters are morons. Both things never happened, but could influence people who don't know that. That's bad!
But what if they use the bill to go after just normal edited video, I hear you saying. Well congratulations! Thanks to people like us thinking about these possible issues, the latest iteration of the bill specifically adds a section to allow normal edits. (And the bill is still being modified so it may even be more clear before it actually gets passed. Plus remember still, this bill is only for paid political ads)
Lastly I'll just show who is actually voting for this bill. Every single Dem voted Yea (or absent), with 43 Republicans voting Yea and 40 voting Nay. I'm sure I don't need to explain why a right wing publication is trying to spread misinformation about this bill, and I'm sure I don't need to explain why there are Republicans voting against this.
I hope I did an okay job of trying to inform and fight against this misinformation, I've never done a post like this but I saw like 3 different posts about this with almost everyone in the comments just believing it. Not on my watch! Togeather we can keep imgur free of shitty propagranda and misinformation.
item.dc:creator: ArmyOfMantisMen

"From Here to There"
"X-ing The Squares"
"Surfacing" All are acrylic on canvas. Thanks for looking!

item.title: You look hungry, want a snack while you browse?
item.description: I've got cheddar, gouda, brie, prosciutto, apple, apricontes, missing hiker, sour dough, rye crackers, blue cheese, salami,
item.dc:creator: Stellaloga

item.title: Cosplaying Miku in public by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/shorts/1XG-U9vFFVQ Hello everyone! My friend Cherry Amaru and I cosplayed Miku together at our local mall. Initially, we had planned to do a photoshoot at the local arcade but turns out we NEVER made it there because we ended up getting hyped by people the whole time and taking pictures with them. It was actually an insanely wholesome day and restored my faith in humanity haha I hope you enjoy seeing behind the scenes of us cosplayers :D I also handmade both of these wigs and the LED headset. Those were very fun crafting projects! Have a lovely day everyone, YuzuPyon
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon
